name: Zombiemachia
short_description: Zombiemachia offers a mature and intense experience for fans of carnage. Face endless waves of zombies with weapons, traps, and dismemberment, all in a realistic environment.
detailed_description:
Zombiemachia – The Art of Brutal Survival

Zombiemachia is an independent horror FPS where you face waves of zombies until exhaustion. No narrative fluff: just survival, blood, and strategy. Realistic graphics, visceral sensations, oppressive atmosphere... a mature and uncompromising experience.Steam Store

Kill zombies and earn dollars

Each zombie you kill earns you cash. But if you dismember them cleanly—legs, arms, flying heads—your earnings skyrocket! How you kill matters as much as how many you kill. Managing your dollars wisely is crucial for survival.Steam Store

Weapons and ammunition

The more zombies you slaughter, the more deadly toys you unlock. Each kill milestone grants you a new weapon. Ammo is often earned by slicing at just the right moment — so every strike counts.

Activate deadly traps

Trigger brutal traps to regain control of the battlefield. Auto turrets, spinning blades... use them with timing to clear areas and catch your breath.

Mutations: change the rules of the game

As you progress, you unlock mutations: permanent upgrades that alter your playstyle and that of the zombies. Each mutation changes the game—making each run more tense, more strategic, more brutal.

Varied hunting grounds

Face hell across multiple maps, each with its own atmosphere and tactical opportunities. Each environment influences your way of surviving. And this is just the beginning...

Global leaderboard: who is the king of carnage?

An online leaderboard tracks your total zombie kills. You'll see your rank in real time compared to other survivors. Kill more, climb higher, dominate.

Face the zombies of the top players

Zombiemachia Corporation doesn't just send random waves at you. The top 100 players on the leaderboard have their stats transferred into special zombies called NEMESIS. These unique monsters appear in your games. Each Nemesis is a real threat, fueled by another player's victories. Climb the leaderboard... or face those already there.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Hungarian, Indonesian, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Czech, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Greek, Japanese, Thai
*languages with full audio support
